heading: Records of merchant mariners’ documents
label: 7319 Records of merchant mariners’ documents
text: The Secretary shall maintain records on each merchant mariner’s document issued, including the name and address of the individual to whom issued and the next of kin of the individual.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)731946:643(f)Section 7319 requires the Secretary to maintain records on each merchant mariner’s document issued and the seaman’s next of kin. However, these records are not open for general or public inspection.
Amendments2021— substituted “individual” for “seaman” in two places.Pub. L. 116–2832004— struck out at end “The records are not open to general or public inspection.”Pub. L. 108–293
